bullish: Swing Profile shows Long signal (▲ label) on 1H or 4H
Lower timeframe (15m or 30m) long signal aligns with higher TF direction
Price is above the recent swing high profile zone
No opposing signal on the daily (1D)
bearish: Swing Profile shows Short signal (▼ label) on 1H or 4H
Lower timeframe (15m or 30m) short signal aligns with higher TF direction
Price is below the recent swing low profile zone
No opposing signal on the daily (1D)
neutral: Mixed signals across timeframes (e.g. 1H long but 4H short)
No fresh swing signal on 1H or 4H within last 10 bars
Price consolidating inside a profile zone (no clear breakout)

risk_rules: Only take trades where R:R is at least 1:2
No trading in the first 15 minutes of the NY session open (9:30 AM ET)
If 2 losing trades in a row, stop for the day
Use trailing stop exit — Trail % = 2.0 (Percent method)
Exit mode: Trail Only — do NOT exit on direction flip alone

include: Current price and % change for primary symbol (SOXL)
Last Swing Profile signal direction and bars ago
Current strategy position: Long / Short / Flat
Trailing stop level if currently in a position
New signals found since last baseline scan
IS win rate vs OOS win rate from strategy tester
Best trail % from sweep table (highest win rate)
